summary: Results-driven Software Engineer with proven expertise in backend and full-stack development. Skilled in PHP (Laravel), Python (Flask), and React (Next.js), with hands-on experience in designing scalable microservices, API development, and multi-tenant database optimization. Experienced in multi-vendor ATM/CRM EJ log data extraction, modernizing legacy banking systems, and cloud deployment. Passionate about solving complex problems and delivering high-quality software.

bullets.text: Designed and developed a microservices-based Reconciliation System using Python (Flask API) and ElectronJS.
Managed version upgrades and optimization for legacy .NET banking applications (IMS: Incident Management System).
Led full project lifecycles, deploying Laravel applications across both Windows Server (IIS) and AWS.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines to ensure automated and reliable software deployments.
Developed and maintained a hotel booking platform utilizing Laravel for the backend and Tailwind CSS with JavaScript for the frontend.
Designed and optimized MySQL schemas to execute high-performance database queries.
Conducted rigorous code reviews, significantly improving team-wide coding standards.
Collaborated with UI/UX and product teams to deliver intuitive, user-focused software solutions.

projects.name: NetCon (ATM Data Extractor)
projects.description: Developed a modular Windows application for Eastern Bank PLC using a Python (Flask) backend and ElectronJS (Quasar) frontend. Engineered interactive data visualization with multi-sorting and componentized UI for multi-vendor ATM/CRM EJ log data extraction.

projects.name: Sharothee Wedding Platform
projects.description: Created a full-stack event management website using Next.js and TypeScript, featuring guest-facing pages, automated RSVP handling, and a full admin dashboard for content management.

projects.name: SR600Mini POS Firmware
projects.description: Engineered firmware in C for a dual-screen POS Payment Terminal, implementing structured UI screens, transaction handling, and resource-aware display logic.

projects.name: Allora E-commerce REST API
projects.description: Developed a scalable backend using Laravel Filament to handle core e-commerce logic (product listings, authentication, order processing) for a containerized deployment. Built a storefront utilizing Server-Side Rendering (SSR) and Incremental Static Regeneration (ISR).

projects.name: NSU eKYC System
projects.description: Built a student API-driven verification system using Laravel and MySQL with RESTful API integrations to external banks and hospitals for seamless data verification.

education.degree: BSc in Computer Science and Engineering

certifications.name: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure 2023 Solution Engineer & Sales Specialist
Oracle Exadata On-Premise 2022 Solutions Engineer Specialist
